commands.review_summary:
The PR routes local `infer web search` and `infer web fetch` through command secret resolution and adds mocked CLI coverage plus the secret-resolution coverage allowlist entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main reads raw config for local web search/fetch while the documented plugin webSearch SecretRef surface requires command-time resolution. I did not run the live gateway command because this review is read-only.
